Signs of Low Testosterone

hormone replacement therapy
Increase your Energy
Today, most Americans live a fast-paced lifestyle that can include eating on-the-go, keeping up with children and maintaining a 40+ hour work week. With so many different things that need your attention, it is very common for people (especially those in the workforce) to notice a lack of energy or even lingering feelings of fatigue. Energy is also necessary in order to maintain dense, lean muscle mass. For aging men and women, it can be even more challenging to maintain vital muscle density and prevent injury or accidental damage to bones, ligaments and muscles. Clinical trials can confirm that compared to placebo, testosterone replacement for 3 years is linked to modest, yet significantly greater improvements in muscle mass and workout power.
In another study, a group of men with low vitality showed that testosterone therapy was able to boost a good mood. While a minimal effect was reported on fatigue, testosterone therapy is still suggested for men with feelings of low energy due to symptoms of depression like a poor mood and lingering mental fatigue.
Testosterone therapy effect on energy
is not to overlook. The study also revealed that men who used testosterone therapy were more likely to have higher energy levels at the end of the trial than those in the placebo group.
learn more
sexual enhancement
Clogged arteries in older men are commonly associated with low or low-normal testosterone levels. This narrowing of the arteries is usually due to the buildup of plaque within the cardiovascular system. Inside the artery walls, your cardiovascular system is responsible for carrying blood and essential nutrients to your body. In order to get an erection, the male body requires a strong and steady blood flow to the penis and other extremities.
However, this is harder than you may think, especially for men over the age of 40. You see, at this point in life, it is common for the Standard American Diet (SAD) to take a toll on the cardiovascular system. In fact, this diet that includes red meats, refined carbohydrate products, dairy and even fast food has been linked to the depleted health status of Americans.
Men who do not produce enough male sex hormone (testosterone) suffer from what is known as hypogonadism. This health problem can negatively affect the sex drive and energy levels of men. However, one study showed that for men with hypogonadism, a 2% testosterone solution was an effective therapy for the symptoms. This leads us to conclude that T
estosterone replacement therapy
positively affects
libido.
learn more
Weight Loss Injections
Our comprehensive approach combines medical expertise, hormone optimization, nutritional counseling, pharmacological support, body composition tracking, and fasting protocols to maximize your success.
weight loss programs
Increase your confidence
Dealing with a busy lifestyle can be tough for men in today’s world. You have to be the perfect father, the best husband, the ultimate provider and the model employee. Sometimes, you may find yourself struggling to keep up with all of these demands. You may be nodding off well before it’s time to go to bed, you may not be happy with what you see in the mirror or you may wonder if you’re keeping her satisfied in and out of the bedroom. What many men are finding out is that testosterone therapy can help with these common problems. Testosterone replacement may be able to give you that confidence back that you once had in your youth. We can help you figure out if this type of treatment is right for you.

the elite Team
About Us
how we help
“I embrace a philosophy of making the most of our time on Earth and living life to the fullest.” – Dr. Carlos Suescun
the doctor’s journey
W
The Ever-Active Early Years
Dr. Carlos Suescun, originally from Tampa FL, attended the University of South Florida for his undergraduate studies. Very active in college, he participated in various sports and outdoor activities, including cross country running, track, soccer, tennis, beach volleyball, scuba diving, and weightlifting. He also had the opportunity to backpack across Europe during his summers in college.
W
Celtic Adventure in Ireland
It was while reading a book called “
Learning to Play God: The Coming of Age of a Young Doctor
” by Dr. Robert Marion that the idea of attending medical school in Europe inspired his next step. Discovering The Royal College of Surgeons in Ireland, Dr. Suescun applied and was accepted. He then spent the next 5 years in Dublin pursuing his medical education. However, even the sunniest of personalities can get worn down by the Irish weather and in June 2003, and seeking warmer climates and blue skies, he moved to Phoenix where he completed his residency in Internal Medicine at Maricopa Medical Center.
W
Birth of Elite Testosterone Replacement
In 2006, Dr. Suescun began working as a hospitalist at Honor Health Osborn Hospital. Motivated by his personal interest in hormone replacement therapy and the proven transformative effects of hormones on the body and mind, he once again embraced his heart’s inspiration and in 2011, Elite Testosterone Replacement in Scottsdale, Arizona was launched!
More About Dr. Suescun – Top 10 list
Constantly pushing himself to reach his full potential, here is his Top 10 list of favorite achievements and experiences:
1. Achieving remarkable top-three placements in fitness competitions
2. Completing two Arizona Ironman races
3. Racing motorcycles such as the Ducati Panigale V4S and BMW S1000RR
4. Motocross and trail riding with his KTM bikes
5. Heliskiing in Whistler, Canada
6. Competing in XTERRA triathlons and trail races
7. Achieving impressive running times in races such as the 15K in 1:01:08 (6:34 minute per mile pace) and half marathon in 1:27:20 (6:40 minute per mile pace)
8. Finishing a Half Ironman triathlon in 5:01:30
9. Traveling extensively, exploring Michelin-rated restaurants and savoring their exquisite cuisine
10.Scuba diving, mountaineering, rock climbing, hiking, camping, and white water rafting.

At the core of our team is a shared commitment to excellence and a passion for delivering exceptional service to our clients. We understand that each client is unique, and we strive to tailor our approach to meet their specific needs and goals.
Our dynamic team of professionals who are dedicated to providing premier client service. Our team is composed of highly skilled individuals who bring diverse backgrounds and expertise to the table.
We believe in building strong relationships with our clients, based on trust, transparency, and open communication. We take the time to understand their business and industry, enabling us to provide customized solutions that drive results. Our team works collaboratively with clients, acting as a strategic partner and offering ongoing support to help them achieve their objectives.
Origin of Elite
The Elite ethos
Being “elite” means providing personalized attention to clients, helping them achieve their unique goals. As a firm believer in practicing what he preaches, Carlos shares his extensive knowledge and inexhaustible energy and passion to motivate clients to become the best version of themselves. He firmly believes that a holistic approach to hormone replacement is crucial, encompassing hormone optimization, medications, proper nutrition, exercise, and a positive mindset. Over the years, countless patients who follow the program have experienced remarkable transformations. This makes the team at Elite Testosterone Therapy even more driven to grow and help even more people.
